package utils

import (
	"fmt"
	"time"
)

// Positive scenario for helper_or_utils_package_contains_domain_logic.
// Rule intent: Generic helper/utils/common packages should contain only technical utilities,
// not domain-specific business rules or decisions.
// Anti-pattern: package utils contains business logic like discount calculation,
// order validation, pricing rules, etc.

// CalculateDiscount contains domain pricing logic that belongs in a domain/pricing package,
// not in a generic utils package.
func CalculateDiscount(orderTotal float64, customerTier string, season string) float64 {
	var discount float64

	switch customerTier {
	case "platinum":
		discount = 0.20
	case "gold":
		discount = 0.15
	case "silver":
		discount = 0.10
	default:
		discount = 0.0
	}

	if season == "holiday" {
		discount += 0.05
	}

	if orderTotal > 1000 {
		discount += 0.03
	}

	if discount > 0.30 {
		discount = 0.30
	}

	return orderTotal * discount
}

// ValidateOrderStatus contains business rule logic that belongs in a domain/order package.
func ValidateOrderStatus(currentStatus string, targetStatus string) error {
	validTransitions := map[string][]string{
		"pending":    {"confirmed", "cancelled"},
		"confirmed":  {"processing", "cancelled"},
		"processing": {"shipped", "cancelled"},
		"shipped":    {"delivered"},
		"delivered":  {"returned"},
		"returned":   {},
		"cancelled":  {},
	}

	allowed, exists := validTransitions[currentStatus]
	if !exists {
		return fmt.Errorf("unknown order status: %s", currentStatus)
	}

	for _, s := range allowed {
		if s == targetStatus {
			return nil
		}
	}

	return fmt.Errorf("cannot transition from %s to %s", currentStatus, targetStatus)
}

// CalculateShippingCost contains domain logistics logic that belongs in a domain/shipping package.
func CalculateShippingCost(weight float64, destination string, expedited bool) float64 {
	baseRate := 5.99

	if weight > 10 {
		baseRate += (weight - 10) * 0.50
	}

	switch destination {
	case "domestic":
		baseRate += 2.99
	case "international":
		baseRate += 15.99
	}

	if expedited {
		baseRate *= 2.0
	}

	return baseRate
}

// DetermineLoyaltyPoints contains business reward logic that belongs in a domain/loyalty package.
func DetermineLoyaltyPoints(purchaseAmount float64, isMember bool, isBirthday bool) int {
	points := int(purchaseAmount * 10)

	if isMember {
		points = int(float64(points) * 1.5)
	}

	if isBirthday {
		points *= 2
	}

	if purchaseAmount > 500 {
		points += 100
	}

	return points
}

// IsEligibleForRefund contains business policy logic that belongs in a domain/refund package.
func IsEligibleForRefund(purchaseDate time.Time, reason string, hasReceipt bool) bool {
	daysSincePurchase := time.Since(purchaseDate).Hours() / 24

	if !hasReceipt {
		return false
	}

	if daysSincePurchase > 30 {
		return false
	}

	if reason == "changed_mind" && daysSincePurchase > 14 {
		return false
	}

	return true
}
